Name: Average time from 'Accepted + In Progress' to 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time between consecutive 'Accepted + In Progress' activities within a case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average time until 'Accepted + In Progress' is performed for the first time in a case
Metric: The average of the duration between the start of the case and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Average time for 'Accepted + In Progress' grouped by 'country'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and the end of case grouped by the last value of organization country

Name: Average time for 'Accepted + In Progress' when followed by 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' versus when followed by 'Accepted + Wait - User'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and the end of case grouped by the last value of organization country

Name: Average time for 'Accepted + In Progress' when followed by 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Total time from 'Accepted + In Progress' to 'Completed + Resolved'
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Total time between 'Accepted + In Progress' and 'Completed + Closed' in variants containing 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Minimum time for 'Accepted + In Progress' in the variant 'Accepted + In Progress -> Accepted + In Progress -> Completed + In Call'
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Minimum time from 'Accepted + In Progress' to 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: The time between the first 'Accepted + In Progress' and the last 'Accepted + In Progress' in a case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Elapsed time between 'Accepted + In Progress' and the next 'Accepted + Wait' activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait'

Name: Time until 'Accepted + In Progress' after a 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Time from 'Accepted + In Progress' to 'Completed + In Call' grouped by 'org:group'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Time of 'Accepted + In Progress' when it directly leads to resolution ('Completed + Resolved')
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: 'Accepted + In Progress' Cycle Time within high-frequency variants (frequency > 500)
Metric: the average of the function base > 500 where base is the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'Accepted + In Progress' and the last time instant when <ppinot4py.model.states.RuntimeState object at 0x727457ec9350> - AppliesTo.PROCESS

Name: Average duration of 'Accepted + In Progress' compared to the average duration of 'Accepted + Wait - User'
Metric: the average of the function base > 500 where base is the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'Accepted + In Progress' and the last time instant when <ppinot4py.model.states.RuntimeState object at 0x727457ec9350> - AppliesTo.PROCESS

Name: Average duration of 'Accepted + In Progress'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + In Progress and the end of the case

Name: Ratio of the average time for 'Accepted + In Progress' to the average time for 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + In Progress and the end of the case

Name: Average time for 'Accepted + In Progress'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + In Progress and the end of the case

Name: Difference in average time for 'Accepted + In Progress' between variants ending with 'Completed + In Call' and variants ending with 'Completed + Resolved'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + In Progress and the end of the case

Name: Average time for 'Accepted + In Progress' in variants ending with 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Total time spent in 'Accepted + In Progress' as a proportion of the total case duration for cases involving 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Maximum time between an 'Accepted + In Progress' and the subsequent 'Accepted + Assigned' activity
Metric: The maximum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Assigned'

Name: Standard deviation of time for 'Accepted + In Progress' across all cases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + In Progress and the end of the case

Name: Average time for 'Accepted + In Progress' when it is the second occurrence in a case versus the first occurrence
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + In Progress and the end of the case

Name: Average time for 'Accepted + In Progress' (second occurrence)
Metric: the average of the function base == 2 where base is the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'Accepted + In Progress' and the last time instant when <ppinot4py.model.states.RuntimeState object at 0x727457ec9350> - AppliesTo.PROCESS

Name: Time from 'Accepted + In Progress' to 'Completed + In Call' for cases with product 'PROD582'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time from 'Accepted + In Progress' to the next activity, regardless of type
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + In Progress and the end of the case

Name: Impact on total case duration when 'Accepted + In Progress' duration exceeds its median value
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Accepted + In Progress'", 'end': '', 'aggregation': 'total', 'metric_condition': '> median'}"
